decisions.why: Specified in code change description with FastAPI, Prisma, Pinecone dependencies for business intelligence platform

decisions.what: ruff.toml - Linter configuration with line-length 88, Python 3.11 target
decisions.why: Code change required E, F, W, B, I rule sets with exclusions for cache and venv directories

decisions.what: pytest.ini - Test configuration with 90% coverage requirement
decisions.why: Specification required testpaths=tests, coverage for src/, asyncio mode for FastAPI testing
Required ruff linting, ruff formatting, mypy type checking, and trailing whitespace removal hooks
Specification required DATABASE_URL, PINECONE_API_KEY, PINECONE_ENVIRONMENT, LOG_LEVEL, DEBUG and other variables
Required to make src a Python package, added descriptive docstring for clarity
